title: Threat Intel Correlator + Scheduled Reports — GraphQL Schema Wiring
description: test_threat_intel_correlator.py, test_graphql_schema.py, and test_scheduled_reports_engine.py cluster together. The report scheduler manages CRUD for report schedules but does not execute reports — the delivery mechanism (email/Slack via n8n) is not wired. The GraphQL schema is defined but not mounted on the FastAPI app.
missing: Report delivery executor: background job that checks due report schedules every 15 minutes and fires n8n webhook with rendered report payload
GraphQL endpoint mounting: mount the graphql schema at /api/graphql using strawberry-graphql with the existing resolver functions
Threat intel correlator → report enrichment: automatically include top-5 correlated threat actors in scheduled weekly intel reports
